hooks.command: jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "UserPromptSubmit", additionalContext: "IMPORTANT: If you need to ask the user any questions, you MUST use the AskUserQuestion tool — never ask questions in plain response text. AskUserQuestion may be a deferred tool: if it is not yet loaded, first call ToolSearch with query \"AskUserQuestion\" to fetch its schema, then call the tool."}}'
hooks.description: Inject instruction to use AskUserQuestion tool for all questions
